title: Blue Origin shifts to hybrid launch system after rocket explosion
summary: Investing.com -- Blue Origin announced it will adopt a new launch configuration following last month's New Glenn rocket explosion, with plans to resume flights before year-end. The company will implement a horizontal/vertical hybrid system instead of rebuilding the damaged launch pad.
